purpose: Product on golden Saudi desert sand dune with horizon. Cinematic, Saudi-native landscape.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Cinematic landscape photography of {product_descriptor} placed on rippling golden Saudi desert sand dune with sweeping dune patterns extending into distance, soft golden-hour light from low angle creating long shadows on sand texture, vast horizon meeting amber sky, shot on 35mm at f/8 with deep focus, evocative Saudi landscape, no text, no watermark, no people, no camels {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, defend. Source code in research corpus: T30. Saudi adaptation guidance: Most culturally weighted environmental chain. Critical: avoid camel cliché (tourist photography). Dune patterns are Saudi Rub' al-Khali or Nafud, not Sahara. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1-2 per quarter, daily during national occasions.
